[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / loop

# Method: loop()

```ts
loop(): void;
```

Resume the rendering loop if it was stopped by [noLoop](noLoop.md).

## Returns

`void`

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="loop" encoded-code="-" />
